journey.name: Manual Entry Full Flow
journey.description: Test the complete manual food entry flow: open form, fill fields, verify save enables, save entry, and verify it appears on the dashboard. iOS parity: ManualEntryTests + DashboardTests.testSeedDataShowsFoodEntryNames

actions.action: Tap "or log manually" on the dashboard
Verify the "Log Food" bottom sheet appears with options: Scan Food, Choose from Library, Log Manually
Verify the manual entry form appears with "Log Food" title, Cancel (X) and Save buttons
Verify the Meal picker shows Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Snack segments
Verify "Add Nutrition Details (optional)" link is visible
Tap the "Food name" field and type "Chicken Salad"
Tap the "Quantity" field and type "1 plate"
Verify the "Save" button is now enabled
Verify "Chicken Salad" appears in the meal list on the dashboard
Verify the hero card shows "450" kcal consumed
Verify the hero card "Remaining" value has decreased from 1940 to 1490
